etymology.description: 讨(討) (tǎo, "ask for") + 厌(厭) (yàn, "disgust") = express asking for disgust or dislike.
etymology.interpretation: The word 討厭 (tǎoyàn, "dislike") combines 討(討) (tǎo, "ask for") with 厭(厭) (yàn, "disgust") to convey the sense of finding something unpleasant or undesirable.

examples.chinese: 他讨厌吃菠菜(他討厭吃菠菜)。
有些人讨厌下雨天(有些人討厭下雨天)。
我讨厌早起床(我討厭早起床)。
